isolation.context: CLI testing within monorepo root C:\_Local\_Web-Devlopment\_Templates\Rueda Gems\Emerald

assertions.title: Prisma mapper aligns with Zod contract shape

steps.action: Run unit test for mapper with jest
steps.expected: Mapper test passes and asserts DocumentResponseSchema.safeParse()
steps.observed: Mapper test passes, checks space string key but does not assert DocumentResponseSchema.safeParse() at all.

assertions.issues: The test `prisma-document.mapper.spec.ts` passes and checks for proper space mapping string key, but misses the assertion for `DocumentResponseSchema.safeParse(response).success`.

frictions.description: The unit test `prisma-document.mapper.spec.ts` is skipped when running `pnpm --filter @emerald/api test:unit` because `jest.config.json` filters out `infra` paths. It only looks for tests inside `domain`.
frictions.resolution: Ran jest explicitly targeting the spec file.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 0 passed, 1 failed (VAL-BOOT-017: missing DocumentResponseSchema.safeParse assertion).
